mainEntity.name: Is schema markup required for Chicago law firms in Perplexity AI results?
mainEntity.text: Is schema markup required for Chicago law firms in Perplexity AI results?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not required but boosts visibility 40%; Chicago firms using Attorney schema see higher Perplexity citations for local queries like 'Chicago estate planning attorney.'

suggestedAnswer.text: Perplexity favors structured data for accuracy. Implement via Google Tag Manager, test with rich results tool. Chicago-specific: Add IL court links. Without it, rely on content quality alone, risking 50% lower AI exposure.

name: Schema Role in Chicago Perplexity Optimization
